product_name: Harry Potter Creative Maker Kitz - Make Your Own Hogwarts Lanterns

bullets: MAKE AND DECORATE Light up your room with the Harry Potter Fairy Lanterns Kit! This complete kit includes everything you need to make these colourful lanterns with real LED lights!
CUSTOMISABLE - Decorate the Harry Potter Lanterns with the included stickers featuring all of your favourite Wizarding characters!
EASY TO MAKE - This Make Your Own kit is easy to complete requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult.
OFFICIAL LICENSED HARRY POTTER TOY - These customisable lanterns are a great gift or activity for any creative Harry Potter or Wizarding World fan!
content.description: Light up your room with the Harry Potter Hogwarts Lanterns Kit! With a string of 10x LED lights you make the lanterns, then customise with colourful stickers featuring all your favourite Wizarding characters!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x String of LED Lights, 10 x Die Cut Lanterns, 1 x Sticker Sheet, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
